name: Ops Observer - Trigger on Completed Researcher Loops
description: Fires once per N=20 completed researcher loops. Sample-size gating is native to the rule via fire_every_n_events (semstreams beta.9). Each fire spawns one ops-analyst loop that analyzes the window per docs/objectives/deep-research.md and emits ops.diagnosis.* findings via the emit_diagnosis tool.

on_enter.subject: agent.task.ops.analyze
on_enter.prompt: Analyze the last 20 completed deep-research loops. Objective spec: docs/objectives/deep-research.md. Use emit_diagnosis to surface findings (one call per finding). When done, call submit_work with a one-paragraph summary listing the finding ids. Persona fragments carry the grounding contract and immutable guardrails.
